---
description: "Use when: editing DESCRIPTION.md so the product contract stays complete, implementation-oriented, and stable for planning."
applyTo: "DESCRIPTION.md"
---

# DESCRIPTION.md Guidance

- Treat DESCRIPTION.md as the product contract for the project.
- Prefer concrete requirements over vague aspirations.
- Include purpose, goals, stack, constraints, integrations, and quality expectations.
- Avoid mixing execution status into this file. Progress belongs in PLAN.md and .ai/state.json.
- If requirements change materially, expect PLAN.md to be refreshed.
